title: ‘I Don’t Care About That’: Trump Says Iran’s Enriched Uranium Is Not a Concern
summary_full: President Trump’s statement was the second time in 24 hours that he had declared that the nuclear problem with Iran had been solved, despite all evidence to the contrary.
summary_public: President Trump’s statement was the second time in 24 hours that he had declared that the nuclear problem with Iran had been solved, despite all evidence to the contrary.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump Says Iran’s Enriched Uranium Is Not a Concern
